subject: Basilisk — a green reptilian-insectoid monster with large spiraling yellow eyes, long tongue, and antennae, from Final Fantasy IX
description: A stocky, quadrupedal creature crouches in a low, aggressive stance. Its body is heavily textured in green scales across the torso and limbs with lighter scaling underneath. The head is wide and rounded with two enormous spiraling yellow eyes that dominate the face. A long red tongue protrudes forward from an open mouth. Two reddish antennae or horns curve back from the top of the head, with blue-red ribbon-like tendrils trailing from them. The tail curves up and around behind the body. The creature's limbs end in clawed hands and feet. The background is a pale green gradient. Art style is bold-lined and saturated, consistent with FFIX enemy design.
foreground: green scaly reptilian-insectoid creature, crouching aggressively with spiral eyes and extended tongue
emotion: aggressive, threatening — crouched low with tongue out and eyes wide
